_comment: Project-local hooks for the Remembrance Oracle Toolkit. Two anti-hallucination loops: (1) PostToolUse on Edit/Write/MultiEdit runs the inline audit + grounding check on the just-written file, surfacing any findings or ungrounded identifier references in the next model turn — closes the write→verify gap. (2) PostToolUse on Read records the file in the session ledger and extracts every identifier into the touchedIdentifiers set, so the grounding check has fresh ground truth to compare against. Both hooks are non-blocking — they advise via stdout, the agent decides what to do.
